segments.text: This player's known for throw usage, so...
segments.original_text: 選手が投げが多いプレイヤーではあるので
そこは意識されていると思いますね

segments.text: Even on the Small Battlefield platforms...

segments.original_text: ストレスを与えていくなTweek

segments.text: Great dash, excellent movement and spacing
segments.original_text: ダッシュ、動きいい間合い管理だ

full_text: This player's known for throw usage, so... That's definitely being accounted for Even on the Small Battlefield platforms... Pressuring Tweek nicely! Great dash, excellent movement and spacing Out of range

corrections.original: 出し動きいい前管理だ
corrections.corrected: ダッシュ、動きいい間合い管理だ
